description: In the API operations guide, move the complete `API Rate Limiting` subsection from under `API Guidelines` to under `Operational Policies`, placing it immediately after `Data Retention` and before `Support Escalation`. Preserve the moved subsection exactly, including its table and fenced YAML block. Leave the `API Rate Limiting Exceptions` decoy heading and the quoted archive mention of `### API Rate Limiting` untouched.
